name: Rusty Sword

description: A stronger spell focus for early Mage builds.

name: Leather Armor
description: Light armor that gives every class early HP and defense.

description: A dependable Warrior weapon that scales well with upgrades.

description: A sturdy shield that enables Shield Guard builds.

name: Iron Shield
description: A reinforced shield for MVP survival.

name: Slime Crown
description: A strange crown dropped by King Slime. Excellent early survivability.
